item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Astrologian's Journey I
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's path to becoming a realm-renowned astrologian─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level astrologian to 60 and complete all job quests up through “The Hands of Fate.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
